# Accordion migration roadmap

<!-- Document content (editable) -->

Spectrum 2 CSS-to-SWC migration notes for **`swc-accordion`** and **`swc-accordion-item`** live here as they are drafted.

For accessibility behavior (APG accordion pattern, headings, keyboard), see [Accordion accessibility migration analysis](./accessibility-migration-analysis.md).
